name: AstraHybrid260IP
comment:
The Astra Hyb260IPLas is an IP-rated moving hybrid luminaire with a phosphor laser source, delivering bright white light for large arenas and installations. It offers a 0.6° beam with high contrast and extensive effects, suitable for both indoor and outdoor stages.
With infinite Pan and Tilt rotation, it provides great flexibility. The motorized zoom and focus system adjusts the beam angle from 0.6° to 37°.
Features include linear CMY and CTO, color wheels with 27 colors, 13 rotating and 29 static gobos, two frost filters, and 8 prisms on two planes. Advanced wireless and ethernet connectivity make it user-friendly and versatile.
